fields.description: The Toyota Camry XSE is a sleek and powerful mid-size sedan. Featuring a 2.5L 4-cylinder engine with 203 horsepower, sport-tuned suspension, and an eye-catching design. Packed with the latest tech including Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, and Toyota Safety Sense.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Audio Interface,Airbags,Air Conditioning,Power Steering,Bluetooth Handset

fields.description: The BMW M3 Competition represents the pinnacle of sports sedan performance. With a 3.0L twin-turbocharged inline-6 engine producing 503 horsepower, this M3 reaches 0-60 mph in just 3.4 seconds. Features M xDrive all-wheel drive and an 8-speed M Steptronic transmission.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Audio Interface,Airbags,Air Conditioning,Seat Heating,Alarm System,Power Steering,Bluetooth Handset

fields.description: The Ford Mustang Shelby GT500 is the most powerful street-legal Ford ever built. Featuring a supercharged 5.2L V8 producing 760 horsepower. This iconic muscle car combines raw power with precision engineering for an unforgettable driving experience.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Airbags,Air Conditioning,Alarm System,Power Steering,Reversing Camera,Bluetooth Handset

fields.description: The Tesla Model S Plaid is the quickest production car ever made, with a tri-motor all-electric powertrain producing 1,020 horsepower. Goes 0-60 mph in under 2 seconds with a range of 396 miles. Features a 17-inch cinematic display and Full Self-Driving capability.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Audio Interface,Airbags,Air Conditioning,Seat Heating,Alarm System,ParkAssist,Power Steering,Reversing Camera,Auto Start/Stop,Bluetooth Handset

fields.description: The Mercedes-Benz GLE 450 blends luxury and capability in a premium SUV package. Powered by a 3.0L turbocharged inline-6 with EQ Boost mild hybrid technology producing 362 horsepower. Features AIRMATIC air suspension, MBUX infotainment, and a panoramic sunroof.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Audio Interface,Airbags,Air Conditioning,Seat Heating,Alarm System,ParkAssist,Power Steering,Reversing Camera,Bluetooth Handset

fields.description: The Porsche 911 Carrera S is the benchmark sports car that all others aspire to be. Featuring a 3.0L twin-turbocharged flat-six producing 443 horsepower. With rear-wheel drive and a 8-speed PDK transmission, it delivers a driving experience like no other.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Audio Interface,Airbags,Air Conditioning,Seat Heating,Alarm System,Power Steering,Reversing Camera,Bluetooth Handset

fields.description: The Honda CR-V Sport is the perfect family SUV combining practicality with style. Features a 1.5L turbocharged 4-cylinder engine with 190 horsepower, all-wheel drive, and Honda Sensing safety suite. With best-in-class cargo space and excellent fuel economy of 28/34 mpg.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Audio Interface,Airbags,Air Conditioning,ParkAssist,Power Steering,Reversing Camera,Bluetooth Handset

fields.description: The Audi Q8 S-Line combines coupe-like style with SUV practicality in one stunning package. Powered by a 3.0L TFSI V6 producing 335 horsepower with Quattro all-wheel drive. Features a triple-screen MMI interior, Bang & Olufsen 3D sound system, and S-Line exterior package.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Audio Interface,Airbags,Air Conditioning,Seat Heating,Alarm System,ParkAssist,Power Steering,Reversing Camera,Bluetooth Handset

fields.description: The Chevrolet Corvette Z06 is America's supercar, now with a 5.5L flat-plane crank V8 producing 670 naturally aspirated horsepower — the most powerful naturally aspirated V8 in a production car. Mid-engine layout, magnetic ride control, and Brembo carbon ceramic brakes.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Audio Interface,Airbags,Air Conditioning,Alarm System,Power Steering,Reversing Camera,Bluetooth Handset

fields.description: The Jeep Wrangler Rubicon is the ultimate off-road machine. Featuring a 3.6L Pentastar V6 with 285 horsepower, Dana 44 axles front and rear, electronic front and rear locking differentials, and disconnecting sway bars. Ready to tackle any terrain right off the lot.
fields.features: Cruise Control,Airbags,Air Conditioning,Alarm System,Power Steering,Reversing Camera,Bluetooth Handset
